page: Amazon Web Services u7i-8tb.112xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance designed for large-scale workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features dedicated Intel processors providing 448 virtual central processing units (vCPUs) across 224 physical cores, with 2 threads per core. The processors operate at a base clock speed of 1.9 GHz.

The defining characteristic of the u7i-8tb.112xlarge is its massive memory capacity, offering 8192.0 GB (8 TB) of RAM, which equates to approximately 18.29 GB of memory per physical core. This instance does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps to support high-throughput data transfers.

Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, the instance ensures dedicated resource allocation and minimal virtualization overhead. From a cost-efficiency perspective, this server represents a highly specialized hardware class with extreme resource density, trading off local storage and high CPU clock speeds for massive memory capacity. It is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large-scale in-memory databases, real-time big data analytics, and massive enterprise resource planning systems.
description: Amazon Web Services u7i-8tb.112xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance designed for massive enterprise workloads. Powered by dedicated Intel processors running at 1.9 GHz, it delivers 448 vCPUs across 224 physical cores. The instance is characterized by its substantial memory capacity of 8192.0 GB (8 TB), providing approximately 18.29 GB of RAM per core. It operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, ensuring dedicated resource allocation. While the instance lacks local storage, it provides a high-speed baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps to facilitate rapid data transfer to external storage systems. This specialized hardware profile is qualitatively positioned for extreme resource density, making it suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data processing tasks that require massive memory footprints without the need for onboard GPUs or local physical disks.
og_description: Amazon Web Services u7i-8tb.112xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 448 vCPUs, 8192 GB of RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale in-memory databases.

tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized virtual server featuring eight terabytes of RAM and dedicated multi-core processors for massive enterprise database workloads.

Massive 8192.0 GB (8 TB) memory capacity for in-memory computing
Powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor for dedicated resource allocation
